code: import React from'react';import{motion}from'framer-motion';import'./About.css';import{FadeTransition}from'./PageTransition';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const About=()=>{const skills=[{category:'Frontend',items:['React','JavaScript','HTML5','Angular','CSS3']},{category:'Backend',items:['Node.js','ExpressJS','SQL','PHP','MongoDB']},{category:'Tools',items:['Git','Docker','AWS','VS Code','DevOps']},{category:'Programming',items:['Python','Java','C++','C','R']},{category:'Operating Systems',items:['Windows','Linux','Ubuntu','Mac']},{category:'Other',items:['REST APIs','Agile','UI/UX','Testing']}];const containerVariants={hidden:{opacity:0},visible:{opacity:1,transition:{staggerChildren:0.2}}};const itemVariants={hidden:{opacity:0,y:20},visible:{opacity:1,y:0,transition:{duration:0.5}}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FadeTransition,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"about section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.h2,{className:"section-title",initial:{opacity:0,y:-20},animate:{opacity:1,y:0},transition:{duration:0.5},children:"About Me"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"about-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.div,{className:"about-text",variants:containerVariants,initial:"hidden",animate:"visible",children:[1,2,3,4].map((_,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.p,{variants:itemVariants,children:[index===0&&"As a Computer Science graduate student at the University of Missouri-Columbia, I combine my expertise in Cybersecurity, AI/ML, and Full Stack Development to create innovative solutions. My proficiency with modern tools and frameworks, including AWS, Docker, DevOps and PyTorch, enables me to develop secure, efficient applications in both AI and cybersecurity domains."]},index))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.div,{className:"skills-grid",variants:containerVariants,initial:"hidden",animate:"visible",children:skills.map((skillGroup,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.div,{className:"skill-category",variants:itemVariants,whileHover:{scale:1.02,transition:{duration:0.2}},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"skill-category-title",children:skillGroup.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"skill-list",children:skillGroup.items.map((skill,skillIndex)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.li,{className:"skill-item",whileHover:{scale:1.05,color:'#3b82f6',transition:{duration:0.2}},children:skill},skillIndex))})]},index))})]})]})})});};export default About;
